sections.title: Part 3
sections.description: 会話問題 — 会話を聞き、各設問に対して最も適切な答えを選びなさい。

questions.prompt: What is the woman preparing for?

choices.label: A
choices.text: (A) A move to a new city

questions.prompt: Who most likely is the man?
What does the woman want to pick up on Friday morning?
What task is the man responsible for?
What does the woman want to do next year?
What does the man ask the woman to do?
What does the woman need a suit for?
What does the woman dislike about a suit on display?
What does the man say that the price includes?
What kind of business does the man most likely work for?
What does the woman say she is concerned about?
What does the woman agree to let the man do?
Who most likely is Axel Schmidt?
What renovation does the woman mention?

choices.label: D
choices.text: (D) Some light fixtures are being repaired.

questions.prompt: What does the woman encourage the man to do?
What does the speakers' company most likely sell?
Why is the woman surprised?

choices.label: C
choices.text: (C) The man has completed a report.

choices.label: D
choices.text: (D) The man bought a new car.

questions.prompt: Why does the woman say, "The slides are available on our company intranet"?

choices.label: A
choices.text: (A) To request assistance reviewing a document

choices.label: B
choices.text: (B) To recommend using a document as a reference

choices.label: C
choices.text: (C) To report that a task has been completed

choices.label: D
choices.text: (D) To indicate that a file is in the wrong location

questions.prompt: According to the woman, what will happen at the end of November?
What does the man want to know?

choices.label: B
choices.text: (B) When he would be starting a job

choices.label: C
choices.text: (C) How to get to an office building

choices.label: D
choices.text: (D) Why an event time has changed

questions.prompt: What does the woman say the company will pay for?
What industry do the speakers work in?
What does the woman say a project will do for a city?
What does Gerhard say needs to be done?

sections.title: Part 4
sections.description: 説明文問題 — 説明文を聞き、各設問に対して最も適切な答えを選びなさい。
